text:
007 First Light Review - Youth In Revolt
James Bond inspired Hitman, and now the circle is complete, as IO Interactive's James Bond game wears its Hitman influence with pride.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
The MIX at Bitsummit 2026 Showcase
The MIX traveled to Kyoto, Japan, for the annual BitSummit indie game festival to play some unique games from international indie developers.

Game Titles in the showcase include:
A Tiny Wander
Baito Fight!!: Part-time Devil Hunter
City of None
CYCLIA JOURNEY
Queen's Blade Re:Build
SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim
Wild Blue Skies
ZHEN: Shattered Legacy
